race.comment: BRAZENGA (3) finished out of the money when fresh from a spell two starts back then was beaten 1.1 lengths when fourth over 1335m at this track 2.5 weeks ago. Suitably placed and drawn the pole so anticipating a big run this time. NAVAL FORCE (2) turned in another moderate effort last start when 1.75 lengths from the winner in sixth over 1335m at this track at the second run back from a spell but looks suitably placed so can turn things around. PENTONVILLE ROAD (11) hasn't been beaten far and only needs luck from the wide draw to play a role again. BURLEIGH (4) scored an overdue maiden win three back and has logged a couple of fifth placings at the runs since, but was beaten less than two lengths in each, the latest in 62 grade. He'll be around the mark again.
